title: Meir wine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Meir wine''' was an [[Alcohol/Legends|intoxicant]] made on [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]]. [[Renna (Rodian)|Renna]] had just starting importing Meir [[Wine/Legends|wine]] to the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]] when a cargo of it was hijacked by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], along with speeder parts. When the goods were recovered from the pirates, Renna let the people responsible keep a few bottles of the wine as a reward.

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: A Cularin Presence}}
